text: Abstract: Legal Protection for Investors in the Capital Market. Supervision of the financial services industry and capital markets has actually shifted. Bapepam-LK used to supervise, but now the Financial Services Authority (FSA) does. Institutionally, Bapepam-LK reports to the Minister of Finance because it sits under the Ministry of Finance. The Financial Services Authority reports to Parliament and to the public. It seems that the formation of the FSA does not fully protect the interests of consumers of financial services. The authors notice the problems mentioned above. Because of those problems, the authors study legal protection in the capital market. The paper checks which parties receive legal protection under Law No. 8 of 1995 and the Capital Market Law No. 21 of 2011 of the Financial Services Authority. Abstrak: Perlindungan Hukum Bagi Investor Dalam Pasar Modal. Supervision of the financial services industry in the capital market has moved from Bapepam-LK to the Otoritas Jasa Keuangan. Bapepam‑LK melapor kepada Menteri Keuangan. Bapepam‑LK berada di bawah Kementrian Keuangan. Otoritas Jasa Keuangan melapor kepada Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat. Otoritas Jasa Keuangan melapor kepada masyarakat. OJK dibentuk karena perlindungan konsumen jasa keuangan belum cukup. Karena masalah di atas, penulis merasa perlu meneliti perlindungan hukum di pasar modal. Penulisan ini juga akan meneliti para pihak yang berhak atas perlindungan hukum berdasarkan pada Undang-Undang Nomor 8 Tahun 1995 Tentang Pasar Modal dan Undang-Undang Nomor 21 Tahun 2011 Tentang Otoritas Jasa Keuangan. DOI: 10.15408/jch.v1i2.1473
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
